name: Diabetic Sour Cream Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 13 x 9 baking pan.
3. Cream together the Margarine and Replacement Sweetener in a large bowl until smooth.
4. Add Eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Stir in Cinnamon, Ground Cloves, and Nutmeg.
6. Sift together Flour, Baking Powder, Baking Soda, and Salt into the mixture alternately with Water, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
7. Fold in Sour Cream, Dried Raisins, and Chopped Walnuts until just combined.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan and spread evenly.
9. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Allow cake to cool completely before serving.
Recipe yields approximately 18 servings, with each serving containing about 124 calories. Exchanges: 1 1/2 bread, 1 fat
